description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, open-top display bin constructed from sturdy white material, likely cardboard or lightweight plastic, with bold printed graphics on the front. The front panel features large yellow and black Cyrillic text, a promotional slogan, and images of red snack packages with a cartoon mascot. The interior is filled with upright red packets, each labeled with white Cyrillic text, suggesting the kiosk is used for retail product display and sampling. The side panels are plain white, while the front is visually dominant with its colorful branding and product imagery. The kiosk is compact, portable, and designed for placement in high-traffic urban areas such as sidewalks, store entrances, or transit stations.
description: A compact, rectangular white display kiosk with bold Cyrillic signage and red snack packages visible inside. The front panel is decorated with colorful branding and product imagery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full promotional signage, product images, and the tops of red snack packages inside.
description_view_1: Side-angled view revealing the plain white side panel and the vertical arrangement of red packages inside.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front but without signage or product imagery, only the tops of the red packages are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the plain white side and the vertical red packages inside.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with bold Cyrillic text and product images, placed on the front panel of the kiosk.
attribute_roof_design: Open-top, flat upper edge with no roof covering.
